title: Light Syrian Roast Paella
description: A savory, crisp, solo-dinner dish that blends roasted chicken with toasted white bread in a paella pan, featuring ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly spices.
instructions: Heat a paella pan over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced roasted chicken and cook for 2 minutes, letting the pieces brown slightly.
Pour in chicken broth and bring to a gentle simmer; season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
While the mixture simmers, toast white bread slices in a dry skillet until golden brown and crisp.
Once the broth has reduced, stir in the toasted bread slices, sprinkle chopped parsley, and serve immediately.
